raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The Big Lift is dedicated to improving literacy among San Mateo County children.",
    "The Big Lift focuses on closing the opportunity gap in early childhood education.",
    "The Big Lift has served more than 10,000 children.",
    "70% of The Big Lift participants are dual language learners.",

    "JobTrain's new Center for Economic Mobility aims to expand services for economic mobility.",

    "The Lot 12 project in Mountain View aims to provide 120 units of affordable housing.",
    "The city is creating a pipeline of 100% affordable housing projects.",
